name: IISc Bangalore (Indian Institute of Science)
description: IISc is India's premier research institution, consistently ranked #1 in India. It offers a unique 4-year BS Research program and is among the top 250 globally. Known for producing world-class scientists and engineers.
notable_facts: India's #1 research university across most global rankings
Only institution admitted via JEE Advanced for BS Research program
Extremely competitive — nearly all seats go to JEE Advanced top 500
Fellowship/stipend provided to all BS and PhD students
Top choice for students interested in research careers over industry jobs

name: IIT Bombay
description: IIT Bombay is consistently ranked among India's top 2 IITs and globally in the top 150, with the strongest industry connections of any IIT due to its Mumbai location. The CS and Electrical programs are exceptionally competitive.
notable_facts: Top 2 IIT — JEE Advanced rank below ~200 required for CS
Strongest placement record of any IIT; highest median package consistently
Located in Mumbai — access to India's largest tech and finance ecosystem
IDC School of Design is India's premier product design program
Powai campus has its own lake, sports complex, and hospital

name: IIT Delhi
description: IIT Delhi is consistently among India's top 2 IITs with a premier location in the national capital. The Hauz Khas campus offers excellent access to government, consulting, and startup ecosystems in Delhi-NCR.
notable_facts: Top 2 IIT — JEE Advanced rank below ~250 typically required for CS
Delhi location = best access to government policy, consulting, and startup internships
Mathematics & Computing (M&C) is one of India's most coveted programs
Strong alumni network in civil services, consulting, and global academia
Consistently among top 5 globally for engineering within India

name: IIT Madras
description: IIT Madras is a top-3 IIT with a beautiful forested campus and is India's #1 institute for research output. It also runs India's largest online degree program (BS in Data Science and Applications) open to all.
notable_facts: India's #1 ranked institute in NIRF rankings multiple years
Offers an online BS in Data Science open to all (no JEE required) — a popular alternative path
IIT Madras Research Park is one of India's largest tech clusters
Strong for Aerospace, Ocean Engineering, and core sciences
Beautiful campus with deer and bonnet macaques roaming freely

name: IIT Kanpur
description: IIT Kanpur is regarded as India's most academic and research-oriented IIT, modeled after MIT. It has the strongest science departments of any IIT and produces the most PhD graduates relative to its size.
notable_facts: Regarded as the most 'MIT-like' IIT — heavy emphasis on research and fundamentals
India's best Physics and Chemistry undergraduate programs
Strong for core branches: Aerospace, Mechanical, Electrical
Produces among the highest number of IIT faculty and US PhD admits
Kanpur city has relatively lower cost of living

name: IIT Kharagpur
description: IIT Kharagpur is India's oldest and largest IIT with the most diverse program portfolio, including architecture, law, and management alongside engineering and sciences.
notable_facts: India's oldest IIT — founded 1951
Largest campus of any IIT (2100 acres)
Has Law, Management, Architecture, and Medical Science departments — most diverse IIT
Rajpur Road proximity to Kolkata — strong Eastern India alumni network
Very active alumni in the US (Bay Area especially)

name: IIT Roorkee
description: IIT Roorkee is India's second-oldest technical institute and particularly renowned for civil, earthquake engineering, and water resources. It's located in the foothills of the Himalayas.
notable_facts: India's second oldest technical institution — founded 1847
Best Civil Engineering program in India
National Centre for Earthquake Engineering Research (NICEE) based here
Located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand — serene environment near Haridwar and Rishikesh
Strong hydrology, geology, and environmental engineering programs

name: IIT Guwahati
description: IIT Guwahati is the only IIT in Northeast India with a spectacular campus on the banks of the Brahmaputra. It has strong design and biosciences programs alongside core engineering.
notable_facts: Gateway IIT for Northeast India — beautiful Brahmaputra riverfront campus
Strong Design department — one of the few IITs with a dedicated design program
Growing research output; consistently top 6 in NIRF
Students benefit from relatively lower living costs in Guwahati
Gateway to Northeast India's natural environment and culture

name: IIT Hyderabad
description: IIT Hyderabad is one of the newer IITs and among the fastest-growing. It has India's first dedicated Department of Artificial Intelligence and benefits from Hyderabad's massive tech ecosystem.
notable_facts: India's first dedicated B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence
Located in Hyderabad — India's fastest-growing tech hub (Microsoft, Google, Apple offices)
Strong placement record for a newer IIT
Collaborative programs with top Hyderabad companies
One of the most research-active among newer IITs

name: IIT (BHU) Varanasi
description: IIT (BHU) Varanasi, established within Banaras Hindu University, is known for metallurgical, mining, and pharmaceutical engineering. Located in the ancient city of Varanasi.
notable_facts: One of the original batch of IITs — formerly IT-BHU
Best Metallurgical and Materials Engineering program among IITs
Pharmaceutical Engineering is a unique and industry-valued program
Located inside the historic BHU campus in Varanasi
Strong alumni in core industries (metals, mining, oil & gas)

name: IIT Gandhinagar
description: IIT Gandhinagar is the most liberal arts-influenced IIT, with a unique curriculum that encourages interdisciplinary learning and creativity alongside engineering rigor.
notable_facts: Most liberal-arts influenced IIT — strong emphasis on arts, humanities, and social sciences alongside engineering
India's first Cognitive Science program at undergrad level
Beautiful modern campus near Ahmedabad — India's startup capital
Proximity to Ahmedabad and its strong MBA, design, and entrepreneurship ecosystem
Smallest batch size among older IITs — strong faculty-student ratio

name: IIT Indore
description: IIT Indore is among the stronger newer IITs with a modern campus in Indore. Its Astronomy & Astrophysics program is unique among IITs and it has a growing research presence.
notable_facts: One of India's few IITs with Astronomy & Astrophysics as a dedicated field
Indore is one of India's cleanest and most livable cities
Strong research publications relative to batch size for a newer IIT
Growing industry links with Indore's pharma and manufacturing sector

name: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad
description: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is India's premier institute for mining, petroleum, and earth sciences, with strong industry links to ONGC, Coal India, and SAIL. Formerly Indian School of Mines.
notable_facts: India's best Mining, Petroleum, and Earth Sciences engineering programs
Strong placements in ONGC, SAIL, Coal India, and oil & gas sector
Formerly 'Indian School of Mines' — historic and specialized focus
Gaining broader recognition after IIT status upgrade in 2016
Jharkhand's coal belt location gives direct industry exposure

name: BITS Pilani
description: BITS Pilani is India's top private engineering university, regarded as equivalent to the older IITs. Its unique Practice School program (industry internship) and dual-degree options make it extremely popular.
notable_facts: India's most prestigious private engineering institution — widely considered equivalent to top IITs
Practice School (PS): compulsory industry internship at companies like Google, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs
Dual degree with Economics/Finance extremely popular for finance careers
No entrance coaching advantage — BITSAT tests speed and accuracy differently from JEE
Has 3 campuses: Pilani (main), Goa, Hyderabad — all have strong placements

name: BITS Goa
description: BITS Goa is the most popular BITS campus for students seeking the BITS experience alongside Goa's vibrant lifestyle. It offers the same BITS degree and Practice School program.
notable_facts: Same BITS Pilani degree — identical placements and academic rigor
Goa's location attracts students who want a coastal, cosmopolitan campus life
Practice School places students at top companies across India and globally
Strong CS and EEE programs; slightly lower BITSAT cutoff than Pilani for same branch
Strong tech fest (QUARK) and entrepreneurship culture

name: BITS Hyderabad
description: BITS Hyderabad is the newest BITS campus, benefiting from Hyderabad's massive tech ecosystem. It offers the same degree and Practice School, with growing placements in top tech firms.
notable_facts: Same BITS degree — fastest growing campus in terms of placements
Hyderabad location = direct access to Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Qualcomm offices
BITS Hyderabad campus is modern and well-equipped
Slightly lower BITSAT cutoff than Pilani/Goa campuses for same branches
Practice School placements in Hyderabad tech companies extremely strong

name: NIT Trichy (National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli)
description: NIT Trichy is consistently ranked as India's top NIT and is often placed alongside newer IITs in prestige. Its placement record, research output, and alumni network are exceptional for an NIT.
notable_facts: India's #1 NIT in NIRF rankings — widely considered equivalent to mid-tier IITs
Placement record rivals many IITs — top packages from Google, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs
Highly competitive: only the top 1-2% of JEE Main qualifiers can access top branches
Strong Tamil Nadu alumni network in the US and in tech companies
Beautiful campus; active cultural fest (Festember) and tech fest (Pragyan)

name: NIT Warangal
description: NIT Warangal is one of India's original NITs and consistently ranked #2 among NITs. Located in Telangana's growing tech corridor, it has excellent placement support.
notable_facts: India's #2 NIT in NIRF — one of the oldest NITs (est. 1959)
Strong CS and ECE placements; major tech company recruiters
Hyderabad proximity gives access to major tech companies for internships
Strong alumni network in the US, particularly in Telangana/Andhra diaspora

name: NIT Surathkal (NITK)
description: NIT Surathkal (NITK) is a top-tier NIT located on the Arabian Sea coast near Mangalore, Karnataka. Strong engineering programs with good placement in Bangalore-based tech companies.
notable_facts: One of the original NITs — ranked consistently top 3 among NITs
Stunning beachfront campus on the Arabian Sea
Close to Bangalore — major tech companies visit for placements
Strong Marine Engineering, Mechanical, and CS programs
Popular for its coastal lifestyle and good academic culture

name: NIT Calicut
description: NIT Calicut is a top NIT in Kerala, consistently ranked in the top 5 among NITs. Known for strong CS, ECE, and Architecture programs and excellent placement support.
notable_facts: Ranked top 5 among NITs consistently
One of the few NITs with an Architecture department
Kerala-based students benefit from the state's strong IT sector (Technopark, Infopark)
High percentage of students pursue higher studies abroad (especially US)
Beautiful green campus in the Western Ghats foothills

name: NIT Rourkela
description: NIT Rourkela is one of India's original NITs and consistently one of the top 5. Known for strong metallurgical engineering due to its proximity to SAIL's Rourkela Steel Plant.
notable_facts: One of the original NITs — est. 1961
Best Metallurgical Engineering program among NITs due to SAIL Steel Plant proximity
Strong research culture; higher publication count than most NITs
Beautiful campus with one of the largest NIT areas
Good placements across core and IT sectors

name: MNNIT Allahabad
description: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad is one of the original NITs, located in Prayagraj (Allahabad). Strong CS and ECE programs with good placements.
notable_facts: One of the original NITs — est. 1961 as one of the 17 RECs
CS placement record rivals some newer IITs
Located in the historic city of Prayagraj
Strong alumni network in IT companies across India and abroad

name: VNIT Nagpur
description: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology Nagpur is a top NIT in Maharashtra. Located in Nagpur — the geographic center of India — with strong placements in core and IT sectors.
notable_facts: Central India's premier NIT — consistent top-10 in NIRF
Nagpur is centrally located — the 'Zero Mile City' of India
Good placements in Pune and Hyderabad tech companies
Strong civil and mechanical engineering programs for core sector jobs

name: IIM Ahmedabad
description: IIM Ahmedabad is India's most prestigious business school and is globally recognized as one of Asia's top MBA programs. The 2-year PGP degree is among the most sought-after in India.
notable_facts: India's #1 business school — top 5 in Asia by most global rankings
Average CAT percentile of admitted students: 99.9+
Average PGP salary: ₹35+ lakh/year (₹105+ lakh for top 25%)
Strong consulting placements: McKinsey, BCG, Bain regularly hire here
Louis Kahn-designed heritage campus in Vastrapur, Ahmedabad

name: IIM Bangalore
description: IIM Bangalore is India's top b-school for technology management and entrepreneurship, benefiting from Bangalore's booming startup and tech ecosystem.
notable_facts: India's top b-school for technology management, entrepreneurship, and finance
NSRCEL (startup incubator) is one of India's most active — 700+ startups supported
Located in Bangalore — India's tech capital. Strong VC and startup ecosystem access
Consistently top 2 IIM alongside IIM Ahmedabad
Strong tech consulting and product management placements

name: IIM Calcutta
description: IIM Calcutta is India's first IIM and is particularly renowned for finance, investment banking, and general management. It has the strongest brand in BFSI (Banking, Financial Services, Insurance) among all IIMs.
notable_facts: India's first IIM — established 1961 with MIT collaboration
India's #1 IIM for Finance and Investment Banking placements
Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Citibank, and top Indian banks hire heavily here
Beautiful campus with a lake and iconic Management Center building
PGP Finance electives are considered the best in India for BFSI

name: IIM Lucknow
description: IIM Lucknow is an older IIM known for strong FMCG sales, marketing, and agribusiness programs. It has one of the best rural management programs in India.
notable_facts: One of the original IIMs — consistent top-4 or 5 in NIRF rankings
India's best Agribusiness Management program
FMCG sector recruiters like HUL, P&G, ITC visit for summer placements
Well-designed campus in Lucknow — clean, green, and well-equipped
Lower cost of living in Lucknow compared to Mumbai, Bangalore, or Delhi

name: IIM Kozhikode
description: IIM Kozhikode is among the top IIMs with a stunning hilltop campus and a strong focus on digital business and sustainable management.
notable_facts: Consistently top 6 IIM in NIRF rankings
Beautiful hilltop campus in the historic city of Calicut
Pioneer in Digital Business Management programs in India
Strong sustainable business and CSR-focused curriculum
Good placements in FMCG, consulting, and digital sectors

name: IIM Indore
description: IIM Indore is a top-tier IIM known for its integrated 5-year IPM (Integrated Programme in Management) that admits students directly after Class 12 without requiring a bachelor's degree.
notable_facts: Offers IPM — India's most famous 5-year BBA+MBA program, open after Class 12
IPM (via IPMAT) is a top alternative to a traditional engineering route to a top b-school
Strong placements: Consulting, BFSI, FMCG well-represented
One of the cleanest cities in India — ranked #1 in Swachh Survekshan
Indore's central location and excellent food are major lifestyle pluses

name: XLRI Jamshedpur
description: XLRI Jamshedpur is India's premier private business school and the top institution for Human Resources Management globally. Admission is via XAT (Xavier Aptitude Test).
notable_facts: India's best HRM (Human Resources Management) program — globally recognized
Consistently ranked top 3-4 b-school in India across all rankings
XAT score required — not CAT. XAT is typically harder than CAT for verbal section
Founded by Jesuits in 1949 — oldest private b-school in India
Average salary for BM program: ₹35+ lakh; HRM: ₹28+ lakh

name: SP Jain Institute of Management and Research
description: SPJIMR is Mumbai's most prestigious private business school, consistently ranked top 10 in India. Known for ethics-driven business education and strong FMCG/consulting placements.
notable_facts: Consistently top 5-7 b-school in India in NIRF rankings
Strong emphasis on ethics, social responsibility, and values-based leadership
PGDM (Post Graduate Diploma in Management) accepted as equivalent to MBA
Mumbai location: Finance and FMCG sector placements are exceptional
Strong alumni network in senior management at top Indian and MNC companies

name: MDI Gurgaon
description: Management Development Institute Gurgaon is a top b-school in India's corporate hub, with particularly strong consulting, BFSI, and tech consulting placements given its NCR location.
notable_facts: Located in Gurugram — India's largest corporate hub
Top consulting firms: McKinsey, BCG, Bain, AT Kearney recruit here
Government-aided autonomous institution — lower fees vs comparable private schools
Unique Energy Management (PGDM-EM) program — first in India
Strong real-world immersion via industry projects

name: FMS Delhi (Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi)
description: FMS Delhi offers an MBA from a top-5 b-school at one of India's lowest fee structures. Its Delhi location and University of Delhi affiliation make it one of the best ROI business degrees in India.
notable_facts: Best ROI MBA in India — fees under ₹2 lakh total for a top-5 program
Delhi location: Strong consulting, banking, and FMCG placements
Consistently top 5-6 b-school in India despite minimal fees
Very small batch size (~220) — gives an extremely tight-knit alumni network
Admission is via CAT with extremely high cutoff (99.5+ percentile)

name: JBIMS Mumbai (Jamnalal Bajaj Institute of Management Studies)
description: JBIMS is one of India's most prestigious and oldest business schools, affiliated with the University of Mumbai. Its finance placements rival the IIMs at a fraction of the cost.
notable_facts: India's most prestigious affordable MBA — fees under ₹5 lakh total for top-7 program
Best finance placements in India outside IIMs — Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Citibank recruit here
Admission via MH-CET (Maharashtra state test) — not CAT, making it more accessible
Located in Fort, Mumbai — heart of India's financial district
Small batch (~120) — extremely strong alumni placement network

name: MICA Ahmedabad
description: MICA is India's #1 marketing and communications management school. Admission is via MICAT (MICA Admission Test) which tests creative and analytical thinking uniquely.
notable_facts: India's undisputed #1 school for Marketing Communications and Brand Management
MICAT test is unique: tests creative thinking, divergent thinking, psychometric ability
Hindustan Unilever, Ogilvy, Wunderman Thompson, GroupM visit for placements
Strong alumni in CMO and marketing leadership positions at top companies
Admission also possible via CAT/XAT scores

name: AIIMS Delhi (All India Institute of Medical Sciences)
description: AIIMS Delhi is India's premier medical institution and one of Asia's foremost hospitals. It requires an exceptional NEET score (~720+/720) and offers the most subsidized medical education in the country.
notable_facts: India's most prestigious medical institution — equivalent to a top global medical school
NEET rank below ~50 typically required; 720+ marks in NEET UG out of 720
Fees are virtually free — ₹1,628/year for MBBS program
World-class teaching hospital and research facilities
MBBS graduates from AIIMS Delhi are globally competitive for residency programs

name: CMC Vellore (Christian Medical College)
description: CMC Vellore is India's most prestigious private medical college, with a 120-year history and globally recognized clinical training and research. It has its own MBBS entrance but uses NEET for eligibility.
notable_facts: India's most prestigious private medical college — globally recognized clinical training
Founded in 1900 by Dr. Ida Scudder — 120+ years of medical excellence
Own entrance test (CMC MBBS Entrance Exam) alongside NEET qualification
Graduates highly sought for residency in USA, UK, and Australia
Service orientation is a core value — many graduates work in underserved communities

name: NLSIU Bangalore (National Law School of India University)
description: NLSIU Bangalore (National Law School) is India's top law school and arguably one of Asia's finest. The BA LLB (Hons.) 5-year integrated program is India's most coveted law degree.
notable_facts: India's #1 law school — admitted through CLAT (Common Law Admission Test)
CLAT rank below ~50 typically required for general category
Graduates go to top law firms, the Bar, civil services, and US/UK LLM programs
Produces India's top civil servants, advocates, and corporate lawyers
5-year integrated BA LLB program — the gold standard for law in India

name: NALSAR Hyderabad
description: NALSAR Hyderabad is India's #2 law school with strong placements in top tier-1 law firms and excellent Moot Court culture.
notable_facts: India's #2 National Law University — consistent top-2 in NIRF Law rankings
Exceptional Moot Court and Trial Advocacy culture
Strong law firm placements: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas, Shardul Amarchand, AZB & Partners
Hyderabad location — growing startup ecosystem offers transactional law opportunities
Strong pipeline to Oxford BCL, Harvard LLM, and other top international law programs

name: NLU Delhi (National Law University Delhi)
description: NLU Delhi is unique among NLUs — it uses its own entrance test (AILET) rather than CLAT, and is considered a tier-1 law school with exceptional Delhi/corporate law placement outcomes.
notable_facts: Only NLU that uses AILET (All India Law Entrance Test) instead of CLAT
Delhi location = unmatched access to Supreme Court, High Courts, and top law firms
Among the best for corporate law, M&A, and dispute resolution placements
Alumni pipeline to Oxford, Cambridge, NYU, and Columbia LLM programs
Smaller batch size (~80) — very tight-knit alumni network

name: Ashoka University
description: Ashoka University is India's first world-class liberal arts university, modeled after US liberal arts colleges. It offers small seminars, interdisciplinary education, and a distinguished faculty of global academics.
notable_facts: India's #1 liberal arts university — modeled after US liberal arts colleges
Generous need-based financial aid available — some students pay near-zero fees
Distinguished faculty: former Princeton, Oxford, Harvard professors
Young India Fellowship (YIF) — a prestigious 1-year liberal arts program for graduates
Great for students targeting Indian Administrative Service, academia, or policy careers

name: Plaksha University
description: Plaksha University (founded 2021) is India's newest but most ambitious tech university, backed by prominent Indian-American technologists. It offers a unique liberal STEM curriculum combining rigorous engineering with design thinking and leadership.
notable_facts: Founded 2021 by Indian diaspora technologists — backed by IIT alumni in Silicon Valley
Unique 4-year Tech Leaders Program: CS/AI + liberal arts + design thinking
Curriculum co-designed with Berkeley, Cornell, and CMU faculty
Generous merit and need-based scholarships — some full rides available
No JEE required — own entrance and holistic review process
Very small founding cohorts (~100 students/year) — tight-knit community

name: Krea University
description: Krea University is a new liberal arts and sciences university backed by IFMR Trust, offering an 'interwoven' curriculum that combines traditional disciplines with real-world applications.
notable_facts: Unique 'ISPP' curriculum — interdisciplinary approach across arts, sciences, and professional programs
Located in Sri City, Andhra Pradesh — proximity to Chennai
Strong economics program — designed with input from top global economists
Merit scholarships available — some students receive significant financial support
Faculty from top global universities

name: FLAME University
description: FLAME University is India's first liberal arts and sciences university, established in Pune. It offers a US-style broad-based education with strong humanities, social sciences, and business programs.
notable_facts: India's first university specifically designed as a liberal arts & sciences institution (2015)
US-style 'open curriculum' in the first year — explore before choosing major
Beautiful modern campus in Lavale, Pune
Strong Psychology, Media Studies, and Communication programs
Popular destination for students seeking alternatives to JEE/NEET pressure

name: OP Jindal Global University
description: OP Jindal Global University is India's most internationally oriented private university with a world-class law school, business school, and liberal arts programs. It is India's only private university in QS Top 1000.
notable_facts: India's only private university in QS World Rankings top 1000
Jindal Global Law School is ranked in the global top 100 for law (QS 2025)
Highly international: 250+ global university partnerships
Strong pipeline to Harvard LLM, Oxford BCL, and LSE MSc programs
No entrance exam required — holistic admissions with merit scholarships

name: Azim Premji University
description: Azim Premji University is a mission-driven university focused on social change, founded by Wipro's philanthropic arm. It offers generous scholarships and is ideal for students interested in development, education, and public policy.
notable_facts: Founded by Wipro's Azim Premji Foundation — mission-driven, non-profit orientation
Extremely generous scholarships — many students pay little or no fees
Best in India for Development Studies, Education, and Social Policy
Strong for students who want to work in NGOs, government, social enterprises, or academia
Beautiful green campus in Bangalore

name: Shiv Nadar University
description: Shiv Nadar University (founded by HCL's Shiv Nadar) is a research-intensive private university combining STEM rigor with liberal arts education, located near Delhi.
notable_facts: Founded by HCL's Shiv Nadar — strong tech industry DNA
NIRF-ranked research university; consistently in top 50 universities in India
Liberal curriculum: all students take courses across departments
Strong CS and Engineering programs with HCL ecosystem connections
Merit scholarships available based on 12th grade performance

name: VIT Vellore (Vellore Institute of Technology)
description: VIT Vellore is India's largest private engineering university and one of the most internationally connected, offering strong placements and a large diverse campus.
notable_facts: India's largest private engineering university with 25,000+ students
Very strong CS and software placements — consistently among top private engineering schools
VITEEE entrance exam required — separate from JEE
Has campuses in Chennai, Bhopal, and AP in addition to Vellore
Strong international student exchange programs

name: Manipal Institute of Technology
description: Manipal Institute of Technology is one of India's oldest and most respected private engineering institutions, part of the Manipal Academy of Higher Education. The Manipal campus is a self-contained university town on the Karnataka coast.
notable_facts: One of India's oldest private engineering institutions — est. 1957
Beautiful self-contained university town near Mangalore, Karnataka
Strong alumni network in the US, particularly in tech and healthcare
Good placements in IT companies; also known for student life and culture
MU-OET entrance exam used for admission — JEE score also accepted

name: Thapar Institute of Engineering & Technology
description: Thapar Institute is India's top private engineering university in North India, consistently ranked among the top 50 engineering institutions in NIRF. JEE scores are used for admission.
notable_facts: Consistently NIRF-ranked top 50 engineering institutes in India
JEE Main scores used for admission — no separate entrance exam
Strong CS and Electronics placements in Delhi NCR and Pune companies
Located in Patiala, Punjab — one of India's cleanest and safest cities
Collaboration with Georgia Tech, Coventry University and other global universities

name: Jadavpur University
description: Jadavpur University is one of India's premier public universities, known for exceptional engineering and humanities programs at near-zero fees. It's highly competitive and has produced many notable alumni.
notable_facts: One of India's top public universities — consistently top 10 in NIRF
Extremely affordable: ₹5,000-10,000/year fees for engineering
Strong alumni in academia, government, and Kolkata's industry
West Bengal Joint Entrance Exam (WBJEE) used for engineering admission
Humanities and Fine Arts programs are also nationally recognized

name: University of Delhi
description: The University of Delhi is India's most prestigious central university for humanities and social sciences, comprising 90+ colleges including St. Stephen's, Hindu College, and Lady Shri Ram. Admission is via CUET.
notable_facts: India's most diverse university — 90+ colleges, 300,000+ students
St. Stephen's, Hindu College, Miranda House, LSR, SRCC are top constituent colleges
Admission via CUET — extremely competitive for top courses like Economics (Hons.)
SRCC is India's #1 commerce college — produces India's top CA/MBA aspirants
Excellent for humanities, social sciences, and commerce at extremely affordable fees

name: JNU (Jawaharlal Nehru University)
description: JNU is India's most research-intensive social sciences university, known for intellectual rigor, diverse faculty, and vibrant campus culture. International studies and political science programs are nationally unmatched.
notable_facts: India's best university for International Relations, Political Science, and Area Studies
One of India's most affordable universities — nearly free hostel and mess
Strong pipeline to IFS (Indian Foreign Service), academia, and journalism
MPhil and PhD programs are exceptionally competitive
Vibrant campus with a rich tradition of student activism and intellectual discourse

name: BHU (Banaras Hindu University)
description: Banaras Hindu University is one of Asia's largest residential universities, located on the banks of the Ganga in Varanasi. It excels in traditional knowledge systems, humanities, and sciences.
notable_facts: Asia's largest residential university — 30,000+ students on a 1,300-acre campus
Best in India for Sanskrit, Indology, and traditional knowledge systems
IIT (BHU) is a separate premier engineering school within the university
IMS (Institute of Medical Sciences) BHU is among India's top medical schools
Located in Varanasi — one of the world's oldest continuously inhabited cities

name: University of Hyderabad
description: The University of Hyderabad is one of India's best central universities for sciences and social sciences, known for high-quality MPhil/PhD programs and a strong research culture.
notable_facts: One of India's top research universities for sciences and social sciences
Strong physics, chemistry, and life sciences programs
Popular destination for aspirants targeting CSIR-UGC NET/JRF fellowships
Peaceful green campus on the outskirts of Hyderabad
Low fees with excellent hostel and library facilities

name: TISS (Tata Institute of Social Sciences)
description: TISS is India's premier institution for social work, human resources, public policy, and development studies — backed by the Tata Group. Its Mumbai campus is among the most beautiful in India.
notable_facts: India's best institution for Social Work and Human Resource Management (non-IIM)
TISS HRM is directly competitive with IIM HR programs at lower cost
TISSNET entrance exam required — separate from CAT
Beautiful colonial-era campus in Deonar, Mumbai
Strong placements in NGOs, Tata Group companies, and social enterprises

name: NID Ahmedabad (National Institute of Design)
description: NID Ahmedabad is India's premier design institution, equivalent to the National Institute of Fashion Technology for fashion and NIFT but for industrial and communication design.
notable_facts: India's #1 design school — globally competitive programs
NID Design Aptitude Test (DAT) is among India's most unique entrance exams
Strong alumni in global design firms, product companies, and startups
4-year BDes and 2.5-year GDes (postgraduate) programs
Beautiful campus in Paldi, Ahmedabad — nearby IIM Ahmedabad campus

name: NIFT Delhi (National Institute of Fashion Technology)
description: NIFT Delhi is India's #1 fashion design institution and the flagship campus of the National Institute of Fashion Technology chain across India.
notable_facts: India's premier fashion institution — Alumni in Lakme, Wills India Fashion Week
NIFT Entrance Exam: Creative Ability Test (CAT) + General Ability Test (GAT)
Delhi campus is the most prestigious of 17 NIFT campuses across India
Strong industry linkages with fashion houses, export companies, and retailers
Fashion Management program is well-regarded for business roles in fashion

name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
